sources: GHL Definitions - All GHL custom fields.csv

fields.label: 1st Shoot Appointment Date
fields.definition: This is date of the 1st appointment with a status of "Scheduled".
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: This data comes from Aryeo shoot data.
fields.fieldNameInZendesk: Field does not exist in Zendesk

fields.label: 2nd Shoot Appointment Date
fields.definition: This is date of the 2nd appointment with a status of "Scheduled". Note: We don't want the 1st, 2nd, and 3rd appointment to be from the same Order. So the 2nd shoot booked field should be the next shoot from a new order.
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: This data comes from Aryeo shoot data.
fields.fieldNameInZendesk: Field does not exist in Zendesk

fields.label: 3rd Shoot Appointment Date
fields.definition: This is date of the 3rd appointment with a status of "Scheduled". Note: We don't want the 1st, 2nd, and 3rd appointment to be from the same Order. So the 2nd shoot booked field should be the next shoot from a new order.
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: This data comes from Aryeo shoot data.
fields.fieldNameInZendesk: Field does not exist in Zendesk

fields.label: Address (Street address, city, state, postal code)
fields.definition: Address of the business that the contact represents
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo
fields.fieldNameInZendesk: Field does not exist in Zendesk

fields.label: Aryeo Customer Profile Link
fields.definition: Link to Aryeo Customer profile. Open profile in a new tab when clicked.
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: This is just the generated Aryeo link

fields.label: Average Order Value
fields.definition: LTV / the number of orders with an Order status of "Open" and Fulfillment Status of "Fulfilled"
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: This data comes from Aryeo shoot data.
fields.fieldNameInZendesk: Field does not exist in Zendesk

fields.label: Business Name
fields.definition: Name of the business that the contact represents or owns.
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo

fields.label: CRE: Type of Client
fields.definition: More specific type of customer/industry Dropdown: Pool Builder/Outdoor Living Interior Designer
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo

fields.label: Customer Origin
fields.definition: This indicates the source that informed the contact of who FPM is.  Drop Down: Instagram (Organic) Facebook (Organic) Online Ad Friend/Colleague Referral Cold Call Office Event Online Search (Google) Brokerage Referral Unknown Ai/ChatGPT
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo

fields.label: Date Of Birth
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Date Of Birth
fields.fieldNameInZendesk: Field does not exist in Zendesk

fields.label: Email
fields.definition: Main email for contact
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Email address

fields.label: First Name
fields.definition: First name of the contact
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: First name

fields.label: FPM Location
fields.definition: The FPM location that would servce this contact (Dallas, Austin, Houston, San Antonio)
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo

fields.label: HB: Annual Homes Photographed
fields.definition: Number of homes that they photograph each year
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo
fields.fieldNameInZendesk: Field does not exist in Zendesk

fields.label: HB: Annual Model Homes Built
fields.definition: Number of model homes built each year
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo
fields.fieldNameInZendesk: Field does not exist in Zendesk

fields.label: HB: Annual Total Homes Built
fields.definition: Number of all homes built each year
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo

fields.label: HB: Type of Builder
fields.definition: Production builders are high volume, lower price point  Custom builders are lower volume, high price points (over $1million)  Dropdown: Production Custom
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo

fields.label: Instagram Handle
fields.definition: Instagram handle (@handle)
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Instagram profile link

fields.label: Last Name
fields.definition: Last name of the contact
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Last name

fields.label: Last Order Placed
fields.definition: The last order that was placed in Aryeo.
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: This data comes from Aryeo shoot data.
fields.fieldNameInZendesk: Field does not exist in Zendesk

fields.label: Last Shoot Date
fields.definition: This is the date of the last appointment that the client had scheduled. Note: appointments that are postponed should not have a shoot date and therefore should not be considered for this field.
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: This data comes from Aryeo shoot data.
fields.fieldNameInZendesk: Field does not exist in Zendesk

fields.label: RRE: License Number
fields.definition: Real estate license number
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Agent MLS / License Number

fields.label: Life Time Value (LTV)
fields.definition: The sum of all past orders the client has placed that have an Order status of "Open" and Fulfillment Status of "Fulfilled". Any payment status.
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: This data comes from Aryeo shoot data.
fields.fieldNameInZendesk: Field does not exist in Zendesk

fields.label: Line of Business
fields.definition: Drop down:  Residential Real Estate Home Builders & Architects Commercial AirBnb & VRBO Editor Spam Lead for out of scope services Other non qualified lead Operational Applicant
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo

fields.label: Notes
fields.definition: Additional notes about the contact that don't fit in any other fields.
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Exists in Aryeo but should NOT be synced
fields.fieldNameInZendesk: Exists in Zendesk but should NOT be synced

fields.label: Phone Number
fields.definition: Main contact number for contact
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Phone number

fields.label: Previous Media Company
fields.definition: The name of the provider that the contact was previously using
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo

fields.label: RRE: Average Listing Price
fields.definition: Average price of property that this contact lists
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo

fields.label: RRE: Brokerage
fields.definition: Brokerage that contact belongs to
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo

fields.label: RRE: Number of Annual Listings
fields.definition: Number of properties listed each year
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo

fields.label: Contact Source
fields.definition: The source from which the contact was obtained. This is typically the source where many contacts were pulled then uploaded into GHL for cold outreach. If a contact enters GHL through Aryeo or Zendesk Support, concat source will remain blank.
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo
fields.fieldNameInZendesk: Field does not exist in Zendesk

fields.label: Timezone
fields.definition: Timezone that the contact coducts business in
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Timezone

fields.label: Contact Type
fields.definition: Lead = Last order placed is "Null" Customer = Last order placed is NOT "Null"
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo
fields.fieldNameInZendesk: Field does not exist in Zendesk

fields.label: Website
fields.definition: The website for the company that the contact represents
fields.fieldNameInAryeo: Field does not exist in Aryeo
